## Quality checklist

- [ ] Follows the correct template from `00-Templates/`
- [ ] Frontmatter is complete and valid
- [ ] First-principles questions are answered where applicable
- [ ] Trade-offs are explicit
- [ ] Mermaid diagrams validate (if added)
- [ ] Exercises / interview questions included when this is a topic note
- [ ] Wiki links and relative links resolve
- [ ] Parent track README / MOC updated if topics changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] No secrets, personal paths, or Obsidian workspace/cache files
